message:
fix: report mcp feature in version, clean up serve pattern and id fallback

- version.rs: include "mcp" in compiled-features list when enabled
- main.rs: remove unnecessary `ref` on Serve match arm
- id.rs: drop misleading "final" suffix from hard-stop nonce fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -197,7 +197,7 @@ fn main() {
         Commands::Version(args) => commands::version::execute(&args, &output_ctx),
 
         #[cfg(feature = "mcp")]
-        Commands::Serve(ref args) => beads_rust::mcp::run_serve(args, &overrides),
+        Commands::Serve(args) => beads_rust::mcp::run_serve(&args, &overrides),
 
         #[cfg(feature = "self_update")]
         Commands::Upgrade(args) => commands::upgrade::execute(&args, &output_ctx),
